BOLT.notes: PRIORITY: #369 SEC-3 harden iframe integration (already in_progress). C4372 shipped JarvisRemoteFrame at src/components/admin/jarvis-remote-frame.tsx loading jarvis-janicka.jvsatnik.cz. Now harden: (1) iframe sandbox attrs — minimum needed (typically 'allow-scripts allow-same-origin allow-forms' for embedded console; reject 'allow-top-navigation' / 'allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox'); (2) CSP frame-src jarvis-janicka.jvsatnik.cz already added — verify no wildcards leaked, no unsafe-inline; (3) parent CSP frame-ancestors 'self' on /admin/jarvis page so the embedded UI can't be re-framed elsewhere; (4) cookies on parent must be SameSite=Lax/Strict (NextAuth default — verify no override); (5) if any postMessage bridge, validate event.origin === expected exact string; (6) referrer-policy: no-referrer or strict-origin so the iframe URL doesn't leak admin pathnames; (7) confirm NO Authorization header / session cookie can leak across the tunnel boundary.
